PageContent.title: PageContent
PageContent.description: Represents static or dynamic content for various pages or sections of the website, supporting dual languages (English and Urdu).

id.description: Unique identifier for the PageContent entity.

pageKey.description: A unique key used to identify a specific page or section of content (e.g., 'aboutUs', 'homeHero').

titleEn.description: The English title of the content.

titleUr.description: The Urdu title of the content.

bodyEn.description: The main body text of the content in English.

bodyUr.description: The main body text of the content in Urdu.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp indicating when the content was last updated.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Defines the details of a memorial service offered by Legacy Stone, including dual-language descriptions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Service entity.

nameEn.description: The English name of the service.

nameUr.description: The Urdu name of the service.

descriptionEn.description: A detailed description of the service in English.

descriptionUr.description: A detailed description of the service in Urdu.

iconUrl.description: URL to an icon image representing the service.

order.description: The display order of the service on the website.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp indicating when the service details were last updated.

GalleryImage.title: GalleryImage
GalleryImage.description: Represents an image in the website's gallery, including image URLs and bilingual descriptive text.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GalleryImage entity.

imageUrl.description: URL to the high-resolution image for full-screen viewing.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to the lazy-loaded thumbnail image.

altTextEn.description: Alternative text for the image in English, used for accessibility and SEO.

altTextUr.description: Alternative text for the image in Urdu, used for accessibility and SEO.

captionEn.description: A short caption or title for the image in English.

captionUr.description: A short caption or title for the image in Urdu.

displayOrder.description: The display order of the image within the gallery.

uploadDate.description: Timestamp indicating when the image was uploaded.

ContactMessage.title: ContactMessage
ContactMessage.description: Stores messages submitted through the website's contact form.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ContactMessage entity.

senderName.description: The full name of the person who sent the message.

senderEmail.description: The email address of the sender.

senderPhone.description: The phone number of the sender (optional).

subject.description: The subject line of the message.

messageBody.description: The main content of the message.

submissionDate.description: Timestamp indicating when the message was submitted.

isRead.description: A flag indicating whether the message has been marked as read.

Memorial.title: Memorial
Memorial.description: Represents a grave location and information about the deceased.

definition.description: Stores static and dynamic content for website pages.

params.name: pageContentId
params.description: Unique identifier for a specific page content document.

definition.description: Stores details for memorial services offered.

params.name: serviceId
params.description: Unique identifier for a specific service document.

params.name: galleryImageId
params.description: Unique identifier for a specific gallery image document.

definition.description: Stores messages submitted via the contact form.

params.name: messageId
params.description: Unique identifier for a submitted contact message.

definition.description: Stores grave location and deceased person details.

params.name: memorialId
params.description: Unique ID for the memorial document.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user.

firestore.reasoning: Standard Firestore structure for Stylish Marble Art with new Memorial Locator support.
